## Description

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] RL Engine (`rl_engine/`)
- [ ] React Frontend (`movewise-react/`)
- [ ] API (`rl_engine/api.py`)
- [ ] Docker / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] Training pipeline runs successfully (`python -m rl_engine.train`)
- [ ] API endpoints return correct shapes (`uvicorn rl_engine.api:app`)
- [ ] Frontend renders without errors (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Docker build completes (`docker compose build`)
